SELECT degrees(r) FROM (SELECT radians FROM angles WHERE radians > 0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE degrees_results AS SELECT degrees(radians) AS degrees_value FROM angles;
SELECT d.radians, degrees(d.radians) AS degrees FROM angles d WHERE d.radians BETWEEN 0 AND 6.2832;
SELECT d1.radians, degrees(d1.radians) AS degrees FROM angles d1 JOIN degrees_results d2 ON degrees(d1.radians) = d2.degrees_value;
SELECT degrees(1.0) * 2 AS double_degrees FROM angles WHERE radians = 1.0;
